raw_response_text:
<features>
- animal type: cat
- fur texture: long, fluffy
- fur pattern: tabby/striped (brown, black, tan)
- ear shape: large, pointed, tufted
- eye color: yellow/amber
</features>
<kb>
- IF [animal type = cat AND fur texture = long/fluffy] THEN [20]
- IF [animal type = dog AND fur color = white] THEN [29]
- IF [animal type = dog AND fur color = brown/white AND size = large] THEN [28]
- IF [animal type = dog AND fur pattern = spotted/speckled] THEN [13]
</kb>

<rule_check>
- The rule for class 20 fires because the Query Image shows a cat with long, fluffy fur.
</rule_check>

<response>20</response>
